name: Complete Type Checker
scope_summary: Implement type checking for all missing expression kinds: while, loop, for, match, call, field, index, cast, array, tuple, struct, assign, return, break, continue.

tests.U01-T02: match on integers with wildcard arm

mocking: None. Uses real HIR from glyim-hir and real InferenceTable.

name: Complete MIR Lowering
scope_summary: Lower all THIR constructs to MIR: match, while, loop, field access, index, cast, aggregate construction (struct/tuple/array), and patterns.
locked_interfaces: glyim_mir::Body, BasicBlockData, Statement, Terminator, Rvalue, Operand, Place, ProjectionElem

tests.U02-T02: Lower while to loop with conditional break
tests.U02-T04: Lower struct field access to ProjectionElem::Field
tests.U02-T05: Lower tuple index to Field projection
tests.U02-T06: Lower array index to Index projection
tests.U02-T09: Lower let with tuple pattern to multiple assignments

mocking: None. Uses real THIR from U01.

name: Complete MIR Interpreter
scope_summary: Implement missing rvalues and terminators in the interpreter: Aggregate, Discriminant, Cast, Repeat, Len, Ref, and support for all terminators.
locked_interfaces: glyim_mir::Body, Rvalue, TerminatorKind, Operand, Place, MirConst

tests.U03-T01: Interpret struct construction and field access

mocking: None. Uses real MIR from U02.

name: Complete Bytecode Backend
scope_summary: Emit bytecode for all MIR constructs: all binary/unary ops, aggregates, discriminant, len, cast, repeat, and all terminators (call, switch, assert, drop).
mocking: None. Uses real MIR from U02.

name: ADT Support in Pipeline
scope_summary: Implement adt_def() in PipelineLowerCtx to provide real ADT definitions (struct fields, enum variants) for MIR lowering.

tests.U05-T01: PipelineLowerCtx returns correct field types for struct
tests.U05-T03: Lowering uses real ADT def for field access

mocking: None. Uses real TyCtx and HIR.

name: Parser Patterns and Loops
scope_summary: Complete parsing for pattern grammar (|, ranges, struct patterns) and loop constructs (loop, break with value).

name: HIR Pattern Lowering
scope_summary: Implement lowering for all pattern kinds: PatOr, PatRange, PatStruct, and complete PatBinding with subpattern.

tests.U07-T04: Lower nested pattern `(a, Some(b))` to Pat::Tuple

name: DefMap Use Declarations
scope_summary: Implement resolution of `use` declarations: import items into current module scope.

name: LLVM Backend (Deferred to v0.2.0)
scope_summary: Stub remains; full implementation is deferred to v0.2.0. Only minimal changes to avoid build warnings.
